channel.title: Apple Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Apple Inc. (apple).

item.title: CVE-2026-43752 · 4.9 MEDIUM
item.description: An authenticated administrator may be able to achieve arbitrary code execution on the host system by uploading a malicious file through the Open Source LLM setup feature in the Admin Console. This vulnerability has been addressed in FileMaker Server…

item.title: CVE-2026-43700 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A cross-origin issue was addressed with improved tracking of security origins. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may disclose sensitive user information.

item.title: CVE-2026-43716 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43720 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-39868
item.description: This issue was addressed with improved input validation. This issue is fixed in iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. An app may be able to cause unexpected system termination or corrupt kernel memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-43721 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: This issue was addressed through improved state management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. A malicious website may be able to silently hijack clipboard data.

item.title: CVE-2026-39872 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43717 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43740 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may result in the disclosure of process memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-43701 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. A malicious website may be able to process restricted web content outside the sandbox.

item.title: CVE-2026-43663 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43726 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43706 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A double free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43746 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43707 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A memory corruption issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43727 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43731 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to memory corruption.

item.title: CVE-2026-43724 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved input sanitization. This issue is fixed in iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. An app may be able to cause unexpected system termination or write kernel memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-43732 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A path handling issue was addressed with improved validation. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may disclose sensitive user information.

item.title: CVE-2026-43708 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved input validation. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. A malicious website may exfiltrate data cross-origin.

item.title: CVE-2026-43712 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43745 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: An out-of-bounds write issue was addressed with improved input validation. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43704 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. A malicious web extension may be able to cause an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43705 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A type confusion issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to memory corruption.

item.title: CVE-2026-43713 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A permissions issue was addressed with additional restrictions. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Visiting a website may leak sensitive data.

item.title: CVE-2026-43709 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43699 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43676 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: An out-of-bounds access issue was addressed with improved bounds checking. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43725 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved input validation. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. A malicious website may be able to process restricted web content outside the sandbox.

item.title: CVE-2026-43743 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: A race condition was addressed with improved state handling. This issue is fixed in iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. An app may be able to cause unexpected system termination.

item.title: CVE-2026-43722 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved input sanitization. This issue is fixed in iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. An app may be able to leak sensitive kernel state.

item.title: CVE-2026-43734 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43718 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A stack overflow was addressed with improved input validation. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected Safari crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-28979 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: An out-of-bounds access issue was addressed with improved bounds checking. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43735 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. A malicious website may exfiltrate data cross-origin.

item.title: CVE-2026-43703 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43742 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to an unexpected process crash.

item.title: CVE-2026-43715 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free issue was addressed with improved memory management. This issue is fixed in Safari 26.5.2, iOS 26.5.2 and iPadOS 26.5.2, macOS Tahoe 26.5.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may lead to memory corruption.

item.title: CVE-2026-28898 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: swift-nio-http2's HTTP/2-to-HTTP/1.1 codec did not validate pseudo-header values for control characters before placing them into the translated HTTP/1.1 message. swift-nio-http2 1.44.1 adds validation of all pseudo-header values (:path, :authority, :…

item.title: CVE-2025-30431 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4, macOS Sonoma 14.7.5, macOS Ventura 13.7.5. A malicious app may be able to access private information.

item.title: CVE-2025-24268 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A parsing issue in the handling of directory paths was addressed with improved path validation. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4. An app may be able to access sensitive user data.

item.title: CVE-2025-43339 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: An access issue was addressed with additional sandbox restrictions. This issue is fixed in macOS Tahoe 26.1. A malicious app may be able to access sensitive user data.

item.title: CVE-2025-46293 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: This issue was addressed with improved handling of symlinks. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4. An app may be able to access protected user data.

item.title: CVE-2025-46315 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A permissions issue was addressed with additional restrictions. This issue is fixed in macOS Tahoe 26.1. An app may be able to access protected user data.

item.title: CVE-2025-31272 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: The issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4. An app may be able to bypass launch constraint protections and execute malicious code with elevated privileges.

item.title: CVE-2025-30459 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A privacy issue was addressed by removing the vulnerable code. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4. An app may be able to access sensitive user data.

item.title: CVE-2025-24284 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: This issue was addressed with improved checks to prevent unauthorized actions. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4. An app may be able to break out of its sandbox.

item.title: CVE-2025-24165 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A permissions issue was addressed with additional restrictions. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4, macOS Sonoma 14.7.5, macOS Ventura 13.7.5. An app may be able to cause unexpected system termination.

item.title: CVE-2025-46313 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A logging issue was addressed with improved data redaction. This issue is fixed in macOS Tahoe 26.1. An app may be able to access sensitive user data.

item.title: CVE-2025-43278 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: This issue was addressed with improved handling of symlinks. This issue is fixed in macOS Sequoia 15.4. An app may be able to access protected user data.
